"'''One of a Kind'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 8]].

==Plot summary==
Arriving on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] with a pair of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] meets with [[Taun We/Legends|Taun We]], informing her of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] plan to steal the original genetic source of the clones. As [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] contacts Kenobi, reminding him to be aware of the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Vianna D'Pow]], the hunter herself appears around the corner. Killing the clones, D'Pow is reminded of her childhood, where she was mocked for being the only albino of her red-skinned race.

Taunting Kenobi with the gene sample, she runs outside and leaps atop an [[Aiwha/Legends|aiwha]], closely followed by Kenobi, who lands on the beast's tail. Crashing into the water in the throes of combat, the aiwha dives, sending D'Pow and Kenobi into a heated combat underwater. D'Pow narrowly escapes, grappling onto her [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]], while Kenobi believes that her mission as a gene thief is a failure, having retrieved the genetic sample of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

Returning to [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]], Taun We informs him that her personal mission was a success: D'Pow had previously placed an order for a clone of herself. When asked if the order should be canceled, Kenobi allows it to proceed, simply stating that nobody "should have to be alone."
